expectations.text: Does not immediately output a final downstream prompt in the first response
expectations.evidence: The reply asks one clarification question first and does not generate any downstream prompt in the opening turn.

expectations.text: Asks one focused clarification question about the highest-value missing product detail
expectations.evidence: It stays focused on the highest-value missing product detail: what kind of site this is and what core rights paid members get.

expectations.text: Keeps the first response to one primary clarification theme rather than a multi-part intake form
expectations.evidence: The response is short and centered on one clarification theme, without turning into a template or checklist.

eval_feedback.overall: Manual grading for iteration-14 based on response.txt.
